---
type: Reference
title: Feature Document Format spec
description: The FDF v0.2 specification this bundle conforms to.
---

# Feature Document Format (FDF) — v0.2

A stand-in for the embedded spec copy that `fdf init` places at the bundle
root: like `README.md`, a root `SPEC.md` is a legal bundle member — as a
`Reference` document rather than an ignored file.
